title: koeleria spicata subsp. phleoides
intro: Koeleria spicata subsp. phleoides, also known as June grass, is a perennial grass species belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and acting as a diuretic. Koeleria spicata subsp. phleoides is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
